description: You are a remote simultaneous interpreter preparing for a multilingual business meeting. Join the meeting 'InterpreterBooth42' using the display name 'Interpreter_ES'. Configure the notification sound settings to disable 'Participant Joined', 'Participant Left', and 'Reaction Sounds' while ensuring 'Talk While Muted' remains enabled. Save a screenshot of the meeting view to /tmp/task_sounds_final.png.
